stories.title: World Cup live updates: Kane, England still search...
Sources: Falcons, TE Pitts agree to $54M deal
stories.summary: Tight end Kyle Pitts and the Falcons reached agreement Tuesday on a three-year, $54 million contract that includes $36 million fully guaranteed, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter and NFL Network's Ian Rapoport.

stories.title: NFL nixes 2026 supplemental draft; Sorsby stuck
stories.summary: The NFL has decided not to hold a supplemental draft this year, effectively halting Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby's path to the league this season.

stories.title: Ronaldo snaps goal drought, 1st to score at 6 WCs
stories.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo made history Tuesday by becoming the first player to score in six different World Cups, finding the net in Portugal's 5-0 win over Uzbekistan.

stories.title: Tiger makes first public appearance since arrest
stories.summary: Tiger Woods made his first public appearance since his arrest in late March when he introduced CEO Brian Rolapp during a PGA Tour news conference Tuesday at TPC River Highlands in Connecticut.
